docs.title: Fenerbahce Beko Istanbul
docs.text:
EuroLeague 2025-2026  |  Scouting Report

Report Details

Prepared by: Giulia Martini Date: 11/04/2026 Analysis Period: Season 2025-2026 This report is prepared analyzing the data from the EuroLeague 2025-2026 season in a programmatic way. Any plot and table are generated using Python, and the source code is available on GitHub. Plots and tables can be regenerated for any team in the EuroLeague and any other season for which the data is available.
